chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.647 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of case 26.08.2025 Mr. Nadeem Ahmed, Advocate for the applicant a/w the applicant. Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl. PG Sindh. SI Ghulam Abbas of PS New Karachi. ------------------------------- Counsel for the applicant wishes to withdraw this criminal miscellaneous application with permission to file a fresh action in case of non-compliance of any orders passed by NADRA and / or upon his complaint to them in relation to the subject matter of this criminal miscellaneous application. Order accordingly. Dismissed as withdrawn subject to all just legal consequences. J U D G E Asif
